node.text: Audrey's favorite recipe is Chicken Pot Pie, a family recipe that reminds her of her grandma's kitchen.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Audrey") on Audrey (Score: 1.00)

node.text: One of Audrey's favorite dishes to make is Roasted Chicken, inspired by her love for Mediterranean flavors and as a comfort meal.

node.text: Audrey set up a doggy play area in the backyard with agility stuff and toys for her dogs.

node.text: Audrey's go-to ingredient in the kitchen is garlic, for the smell and taste it adds to dishes.

node.text: Audrey believes that small acts of love towards pets make a big difference in their relationships.
